value: There's a coffee shop near my apartment that plays exclusively 90s R&B. I don't know whose decision that was but I respect it deeply. I go there to write, mostly, though what I actually do is stare at my laptop while Boyz II Men plays in the background and wonder if this is what being a writer is. A double oat latte, no foam. The same thing, every day. The barista knows my order, which makes me feel simultaneously special and predictable. Or maybe I'm just boring. There's comfort in repetition, I tell myself. Either way, the coffee is good.
